task:
Generate an HBR-quality strategic newsletter about: Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP)

Key Concepts: Agentic AI, Commerce Protocols, Travel Technology
Target Audience: TUI Leadership and Strategy Teams

The newsletter should:
1. Analyze how UCP affects TUI's strategic positioning
2. Identify counterintuitive insights about agentic commerce
3. Include a provocative headline that challenges conventional wisdom
4. Follow HBR Five Core Qualities (clarity, evidence, tone, flow, insight)

Agentic AI commerce protocols autonomous transactions machine-to-machine payments
Travel technology distribution systems GDS NDC API-first architecture disruption
TUI Group digital transformation strategy technology investments 2023 2024
Commerce protocol standards interoperability payments authentication B2B B2C
Travel industry intermediation disintermediation OTA direct booking agent-based booking
